title: Farm Animals Backport (Modded Support)
description: Backports the Spring to Life(1.21.5) Update textures for farm animals. Now with Some Modded Support.
body:
Need a server for you and your friends? click the image below:

[![](https://cdn.apexminecrafthosting.com/img/theme/apex-hosting-mobile.png)](https://billing.apexminecrafthosting.com/aff.php?aff=16230)

# Farm Animals: Spring to Life
Ever wanted the new mobs on older versions? then this is the pack for you.

This pack adds the new models and textures from the Spring to Life update to older versions.

![Warm Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa2a65f5a6c174f348b71058c94852befefc3d1c.png)

## Mods Supported
- [Biomes O' Plenty](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomes-o-plenty)
- [Oh The Biomes You'll Go](https://modrinth.com/mod/biomesyougo)


## REQUIREMENTS
**[EMF] Entity Model Features OR Optifine IS REQUIRED FOR THIS TO WORK.**

[https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)

[https://optifine.net/home](https://optifine.net/home) (Don't know if it works.)
